faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions about CalcHub

faq1.a: We use banking formulas approved by financial regulators. Results match leading banks' calculations down to the cent.

faq2.q: Do I need to register to use the calculators?
faq2.a: No, all calculators are completely free and available without registration. Just open the calculator you need and start calculating.

faq3.q: How does CalcHub account for my country's specifics?
faq3.a: We adapt formulas to the tax legislation, interest rates and financial standards of each of the 20+ supported countries.

faq4.q: Is it safe to enter financial data?
faq4.a: Absolutely. All calculations are performed locally in your browser. We do not send or store your data on any server.

faq5.q: Can I use CalcHub on my mobile phone?
faq5.a: Yes, CalcHub is fully responsive. All calculators work equally well on any screen size.
